prompt: Hero is in the big blind and villain is on the button. Who is out of position after the flop?
why_v1: The big blind acts first after the flop against the button, so hero is out of position.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. Hero is out of position because the big blind has to act before the button.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. Hero is out of position here because the big blind acts first after the flop.
